PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?previousClub ?previousClubLabel WHERE {
  ?player p:P54 ?birminghamStatement .
  ?birminghamStatement ps:P54 wd:Q31622 ; pq:P580 ?transferDate ; pq:P379 ?transferFee .
  ?transferFee wikibase:quantityAmount ?feeValue ; wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q3366 .
  FILTER(?feeValue = 200000)
  FILTER(?transferDate >= "1997-07-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  FILTER(?transferDate <= "1998-06-30" ^^ xsd:date)
  ?player p:P2004 ?previousStatement .
  ?previousStatement ps:P2004 ?previousClub .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?previousClub rdfs:label ?previousClubLabel
  }
}
LIMIT 1
